dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_PACKAGE_TYPE)
Editor
com.neighborhub.app
NeighborHub needs access to your calendar to save and display community events.
NeighborHub needs access to your camera to allow you to take photos for marketplace listings and community posts.
NeighborHub needs access to your contacts to help you invite neighbors and share emergency contact information.
NeighborHub uses your location to provide local weather information, verify your neighborhood for community features, and enable location-based safety and social features.

NeighborHub uses your location to provide local weather information, verify your neighborhood for community features, and enable location-based safety and social features. Your location is only accessed when you're actively using the app.
NeighborHub needs access to your microphone to allow recording and sending voice messages in chat.
NeighborHub needs access to save photos and images shared in the community to your photo library.
NeighborHub needs access to your photo library to allow you to select photos for marketplace listings, community posts, and profile pictures.
NeighborHub uses speech recognition to convert patrol push-to-talk audio into text transcripts for team coordination and incident history.

NeighborHub uses notifications to alert you when a neighbor requests assistance, reports an issue, creates a new event, lists a marketplace item, or sends a new chat message, as well as for important community updates.
NeighborHub needs access to weather data to display current weather conditions and forecasts for your neighborhood.
pk_test_ac48c9308d56e3b0c9dc469de7fabc23d3ff32f0
Default Configuration
